Metadata.title: PixelVault | Personal AI Gallery
Metadata.description: Generate with multiple AI image models, then archive every result in one personal gallery.

Homepage.brandSubline: A quieter place to make and keep AI images.
Homepage.heroDescription: Generate across leading image models, keep the strong results, and return to a library that preserves the prompt and route behind each image.

auth.note: Your account keeps saved routes, private prompts, and archived generations together across sessions.

signIn.title: Return to your archive.
signIn.description: Sign in to continue generating, review saved work, and keep your usage history intact.

signUp.title: Begin a calmer image workflow.
signUp.description: Create an account to generate with multiple models, save each keeper, and build a record you can return to later.

stage.label: Gallery preview
stage.title: See how it comes together.
stage.value: A cleaner record of how you create

signals.modelCoverageValue: {modelCount} image models across {providerCount, plural, one {# provider} other {# providers}}
signals.archiveValue: Prompt, model, provider, and output stay together

features.title: A quieter workflow for making images.
features.description: PixelVault keeps the studio focused and the archive readable, so the interface does not compete with the work.

chooseEngine.title: Switch models without switching tools
chooseEngine.description: Move between realism, anime styling, OpenAI image generation, and Gemini exploration from one studio.

keepEveryKeeper.title: Keep the work worth revisiting
keepEveryKeeper.description: Good results do not disappear after one session. They stay in an archive you can return to later.

spendCredits.title: See what each run costs
spendCredits.description: Each generation keeps its provider and model context, so usage stays understandable instead of vague.

workflow.title: From prompt to archive, without clutter.
workflow.description: Pick a model, write with intent, and keep the result with the context that produced it.

frameIdea.title: Frame the idea
frameIdea.description: Start with the prompt and choose the model that fits the image you want to make.

generateWithIntent.title: Generate with intent
generateWithIntent.description: Compare photoreal, anime, OpenAI, and Gemini outputs without leaving the same workspace.

archiveWinners.title: Archive the winners
archiveWinners.description: Keep the prompt, route, and final image together so the next session starts with context.

models.title: Four image models. One calm workspace.
models.description: Switch between realism, anime stylization, OpenAI image generation, and fast Gemini exploration without changing tools.

sdxlRealism.prompt: Stormlight sweeping across a quiet brutalist museum courtyard

animagineAnime.prompt: Courier on a hoverboard threading through a lantern market at dusk

geminiConcept.prompt: Editorial still life of camera parts, metal tools, and pressed flowers

footer.title: The image is only part of the work.
footer.description: PixelVault keeps the surrounding context intact, so the next idea starts from memory instead of guesswork.

StudioPage.heroTitle: A quieter studio for focused generation
StudioPage.heroDescription: Choose a route, write the prompt, and review the latest result in one workspace.
StudioPage.workspaceDescription: Route details, prompt writing, reference input, and results now share the same calmer structure.

metrics.modelCoverageValue: {modelCount} available models across {providerCount, plural, one {# provider} other {# providers}}
metrics.archiveBehaviorValue: Every result stays tied to its prompt and route details.

GalleryPage.heroTitle: A public record, not just a wall of images.
GalleryPage.heroDescription: Every public generation keeps its prompt, model, and provider context attached, so the gallery reads like an archive instead of a loose feed.

metrics.archiveSizeValue: {count, plural, =0 {No public images yet} one {# public image} other {# public images}}
metrics.modelCoverageValue: {count, plural, one {# built-in image model} other {# built-in image models}}
metrics.curationValue: Newest images come first, with full context one click away.

GalleryPage.feedDescription: Browse recent outputs from across the archive, then load more when you want to go deeper.
GalleryPage.emptyTitle: The public archive is still quiet
GalleryPage.emptyDescription: Public generations will appear here once creators begin sharing work from the studio.
GalleryPage.endOfArchive: That is the current end of the public archive.

LibraryPage.heroTitle: Your recent work, kept in one archive.
LibraryPage.heroDescription: Recent outputs, visibility state, and cumulative API usage live together here so the next session starts with context.

metrics.totalWorksValue: {count, plural, =0 {No saved images yet} one {# saved image} other {# saved images}}
metrics.publicWorksValue: {count, plural, =0 {No public images} one {# public image} other {# public images}}
metrics.privateWorksValue: {count, plural, =0 {No private images} one {# private image} other {# private images}}

LibraryPage.collectionDescription: This view shows the newest images in your archive, including whether each one is currently public.
LibraryPage.emptyDescription: Run your first image in Studio and it will appear here with its prompt and route details.
LibraryPage.syncPendingDescription: We could not find an archive profile for this account yet. Return to the studio and refresh after Clerk sync completes.

StudioForm.keyStatusSavedRouteDescription: {label} ({maskedKey}) will be used for this route.
StudioForm.keyStatusFallbackDescription: This workspace route calls PixelVault's configured {provider} endpoint and fallback key when available.
StudioForm.modelCustomDescription: Custom {provider} model routed through your saved provider route.
StudioForm.promptHint: Describe the subject, setting, light, composition, or style as clearly as you can.
StudioForm.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
StudioForm.referenceSelectedDescription: Image selected. The next run will use it as reference guidance.
StudioForm.referenceIdleDescription: Optional. Upload a reference image when you want the generation to follow an existing composition or mood.
StudioForm.referenceUploadAction: Drag and drop or click to upload
StudioForm.ctaSectionDescription: Check the route and prompt, then generate when you are ready.
StudioForm.resultDescription: The newest image from this workspace appears here.
StudioForm.resultEmptyDescription: Run the form to preview the newest image in this workspace.
StudioForm.resultStorageNote: Stored with its prompt and route context.

modelSelector.label: AI model
modelSelector.hint: Choose a built-in model or one of your active saved routes.
modelSelector.customDescription: Custom {provider} model using your saved route.

StudioApiKeys.triggerCount: {count, plural, =0 {No active routes} one {# active route} other {# active routes}}
StudioApiKeys.sheetDescription: Save provider routes per model, customize the provider label and base URL, and enable only the routes you want to surface in Studio.
StudioApiKeys.title: Saved provider routes
StudioApiKeys.description: Each saved route combines an adapter, provider config, model ID, and key. Built-in workspace routes stay available by default, while enabled saved routes appear alongside them in Studio.
StudioApiKeys.groupCustomDescription: Custom {adapter} model with one or more saved routes.
StudioApiKeys.emptyCustomDescription: Add a custom model ID when you want to run a provider route outside the built-in catalog.

huggingface.label: HuggingFace
huggingface.description: Use a HuggingFace-compatible adapter and endpoint shape.

gemini.label: Gemini
gemini.description: Use Gemini image generation endpoints or a compatible proxy.

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.description: Use OpenAI Images endpoints or an OpenAI-compatible proxy.

summary.activeRoutesValue: {count, plural, =0 {No active routes} one {# active route} other {# active routes}}
summary.builtInModelsValue: {count, plural, one {# built-in model} other {# built-in models}}
summary.customRoutesValue: {count, plural, =0 {No custom routes} one {# custom route} other {# custom routes}}
summary.routeCount: {count, plural, =0 {No routes} one {# route} other {# routes}}

sections.builtInDescription: Add saved routes when you want a built-in model to use your own key or a custom provider endpoint.
sections.customDescription: Enable any saved custom route to surface it in the Studio model picker.

addForm.title: Add a saved route
addForm.description: Choose the adapter, configure the provider label and base URL, then attach a model ID and API key.
addForm.providerBaseUrlHint: Use the adapter-compatible base URL. The model ID will be appended automatically when the adapter requires it.
addForm.customModelHint: Enter the exact {provider} model ID you want to call.

preset.label: Use a built-in model
preset.description: Expose a saved route for one of the models already available in Studio.

custom.label: Use a custom model ID
custom.description: Bring your own model ID when you need a route outside the preset catalog.

GalleryCard.openImage: Open image in a new tab

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.description: Add environment, lighting, and texture details

artistic.label: Artistic
artistic.description: Add art style and medium references

anime.label: Anime
anime.description: Add anime style and character details

ReverseEngineer.title: Reverse Engineer
ReverseEngineer.uploadTitle: Drop an image or click to upload

sdxl.label: Stable Diffusion XL
sdxl.description: High-resolution image generation with excellent detail.

geminiFlashImage.label: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image
geminiFlashImage.description: Fast image exploration powered by Google's latest generation model.

openaiGptImage15.label: OpenAI GPT Image 1.5
openaiGptImage15.description: OpenAI's latest image model for polished, prompt-faithful image generation.

flux2Pro.label: Flux 2 Pro
flux2Pro.description: Top-ranked image model by Black Forest Labs with exceptional quality.

flux2Dev.label: Flux 2 Dev
flux2Dev.description: Cost-effective variant of Flux 2 for development and iteration.

flux2Schnell.label: Flux 2 Schnell
flux2Schnell.description: Fastest Flux 2 variant for rapid prototyping and quick generation.

geminiProImage.label: Gemini 3 Pro Image
geminiProImage.description: Google's premium image model with top-tier quality and prompt adherence.

ideogram2.label: Ideogram 2.0
ideogram2.description: Exceptional at rendering text in images with strong artistic quality.
